data.title: Lilly (NYSE:LLY) to join Wells Fargo 20th Annual Healthcare Conference on Sept. 5, 2025 with Patrik Jonsson, EVP.
data.description: A global pharmaceutical company, Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY), is set to join the Wells Fargo 20th Annual Healthcare Conference on September 5, 2025. Patrik Jonsson, the executive vice president and president of Lilly International, will engage in a fireside chat at 9:30 a.m. during the conference.

data.title: Smilegate launches official community for RPG MIRESI: Invisible Future, unveils key visual. Featuring art by Kim Hyung-seop.
data.description: A new title, MIRESI: Invisible Future, has recently launched its official community channel. This subculture-themed collectible RPG boasts stunning visuals created by Art Director Hyung-seop "Hyulla" Kim and an original lore. The launch took place in SEOUL, South Korea on Aug 22, 2025. Fans can expect additional game details to be gradually revealed through the community channel. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting release.

data.title: Rocket Lab to launch 70th Electron mission; Shares up 63% in 2025. Watch the milestone launch.
data.description: On Saturday, Rocket Lab successfully completed its 70th Electron mission, marking a significant milestone for the SpaceX competitor. The company's shares have surged by 63% in 2025, showcasing strong investor confidence in its performance. This achievement highlights Rocket Lab's growing presence in the space industry and its capability to compete with established players like SpaceX. For those interested in witnessing Rocket Lab's success, details on how to watch the milestone launch can be found in the latest update.

data.title: Nuclear-related stocks down for the week due to AI market pause, part of broader trend.
data.description: Stocks in the nuclear sector were experiencing a decrease in value for the week, in line with a general slowdown in the AI stock market. This suggests that the nuclear industry is not shielded from the current market downturn influenced by AI technology. The trend indicates a potential weekly decline in the value of nuclear-related stocks, mirroring the broader market conditions.

data.title: Workday stock fell after reporting Q2 earnings above estimates, but revenue guidance disappoints.
data.description: Following the release of its second-quarter earnings report, Workday saw a decline in its stock value. The software maker exceeded earnings estimates but its revenue guidance met expectations. The company's stock fell as a result. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Nook Coffee Bar opens in London, Ohio with support from Crimson Cup Coffee & Tea's program, serving specialty drinks.
data.description: In downtown London, Ohio, The Nook Coffee Bar recently opened its doors after following Crimson Cup Coffee & Tea's 7 Steps to Success program. Established on August 22, 2025, the cafe fulfills a cherished ambition, offering a variety of specialty coffee beverages to its customers. The cozy setting aims to foster a sense of community and is situated at a prime location in the area.

data.title: Philippines proposes holding 10,000 Bitcoin as strategic reserve, requiring 2,000 BTC purchase yearly for 5 years, held for 20 years.
data.description: Under the proposed legislation, the central bank is mandated to purchase 2,000 Bitcoin each year for a duration of five years and retain these assets for a minimum of twenty years.

data.title: Tempus buys Paige, a digital pathology AI firm, enhancing dataset, team, and tech. Founded in 2017, Paige has strong AI apps.
data.description: In Chicago, Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM) unveiled its acquisition of Paige, a digital pathology-focused AI company. The move aims to strengthen Tempus's position by enhancing its dataset, workforce, and presence in digital pathology with cutting-edge technology. Paige, established in 2017, has created various AI applications and is poised to bolster Tempus's capabilities in this field. The acquisition marks a significant milestone for Tempus as it continues to lead the advancement of AI in precision medicine.

data.title: Huntington Insurance, Inc. named 2025 Best Practices Agency for leading growth, innovation, and excellence.
data.description: Huntington Insurance Inc., a licensed agency and wholly-owned subsidiary of Huntington Bancshares, has been recognized with a national designation for its exceptional growth, innovation, and operational excellence. This designation signifies Huntington Insurance Inc. as a top-performing independent insurance agency in the country. As of August 22, 2025, the company's achievements highlight its leading position in the industry, demonstrating remarkable success in key areas. This prestigious acknowledgment showcases the company's commitment to excellence and distinguishes it among its peers.

data.title: Darkroom names Julie Novak as Executive Leader for Social Commerce, notable for driving $5 billion in revenue.
data.description: In New York on August 22, 2025, Darkroom, a rapidly expanding digital commerce agency, has revealed that it has successfully generated more than $5 billion in revenue for top consumer brands. The company is excited to share the news of Julie Novak's new role as the executive head of its Social Commerce division.

data.title: Recruit Limitless offers unlimited hiring plans starting at $999/month for businesses globally, aiming to revolutionize recruitment.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, companies in New York and Los Angeles were introduced to Recruit Limitless by Hyperlink InfoSystem. This subscription-based recruitment service is changing the industry by offering unlimited hiring for a fixed fee. In a time where recruiting top talent is expensive and time-intensive, this innovative model provides businesses with a cost-effective solution. This disruption in the recruitment sector aims to offer companies in these cities access to a limitless pool of candidates, reducing the burden and financial strain of traditional hiring processes.

data.title: American Dream Institute launched to engage young Americans with data-driven messaging & tech tools. NAPA, Calif., Aug. 22, 2025.
data.description: In an effort to equip progressive leaders, creators, and organizations with data-driven messaging and tech tools to engage young Americans, a new digital-first initiative is set to launch. Recent research has revealed that shared economic challenges are bringing together a generation that is otherwise divided. This initiative, based in NAPA, Calif., aims to bridge the gap by providing crucial resources. The initiative, which will be unveiled on August 22, 2025, seeks to address the needs of young Americans facing economic hardships.

data.title: Edison Equity Residential, LLC partners with ARCTRUST to develop 165-residence 55+ community in Woodforest, Texas. #InnovativeLiving
data.description: Edison Equity Residential, headquartered in Texas, partnered with ARCTRUST on August 8, 2025, to establish a new 165-residence community that aims to revolutionize age-restricted living with a strong emphasis on customized, amenity-rich lifestyles. This joint venture, located in Houston, signifies a significant investment in redefining residential living for older adults, showcasing a commitment to innovative and service-oriented housing solutions.

data.title: Teamworks and ESPN partner for college football, providing Coaching and Scouting platform to ESPN's research team.
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, on August 22, 2025, Teamworks, a leading provider of the Operating System for Sports™ used by over 6,500 top-tier sports teams worldwide, unveiled a new collaboration with ESPN. This strategic partnership will grant ESPN's research team access to Teamworks' Coaching and Scouting platform. This move aims to enhance the network's sports coverage and analysis capabilities.

data.title: Sarah Personette joins LifeStance Health board; Director William Miller to resign. Aug. 22, 2025. LFST stock.
data.description: Director William Miller will be resigning from his position in LifeStance Health, a prominent provider of outpatient mental health care services. This was disclosed on August 22, 2025, in Scottsdale, Arizona. LifeStance Health, listed on NASDAQ as LFST, revealed that Sarah Personette will be taking over the role. LifeStance Health is known for being a major player in the mental health care sector, serving a significant number of patients across the nation.

data.title: Flowers Foods (NYSE: FLO) declares a quarterly dividend of $0.2475 per share, up 3.1% from last year.
data.description: In Thomasville, Georgia on August 22, 2025, Flowers Foods, Inc. disclosed a quarterly dividend of $0.2475 per share as declared by its board of directors. This marks a 3.1% rise from the prior year's quarter. The company's streak continues with this being their 92nd consecutive quarterly dividend payout. Flowers Foods trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol FLO.

data.title: Unitree G1 robot grabs global attention with viral moments, promises joy and companionship. Making humanoid integration worldwide.
data.description: Based in Hangzhou, China, as of August 22, 2025, robotics company Unitree is committed to developing enjoyable, approachable, and interactive robots for the general population. Its goal is to provide happiness and companionship through robotics technology. The company is expanding the reach of its humanoid robot, the G1 model, globally.

data.title: Nikon Inc. unveils NIKKOR Z 24-70mm f/2.8 S II lens, fastest AF & lightest weight, setting new performance standard.
data.description: Nikon Inc. has recently unveiled the latest addition to the NIKKOR Z lineup, the high-performance NIKKOR Z 24-70mm f/2.8 S II lens. Engineered for superior reliability and agility, this next-generation zoom lens is designed to set a new benchmark for performance. The lens promises exceptional quality and versatility, with a focal length range of 24-70mm and a fast aperture of f/2.8. The NIKKOR Z 24-70mm f/2.8 S II is set to redefine standards in its class, targeting photographers and videographers seeking top-notch image quality and precision.

data.title: PPL Corporation to pay $0.2725 per share stock dividend quarterly on Oct. 1, 2025. Shareowners of record by Sept. 10, 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, PPL Corporation (NYSE: PPL) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2725 per share, to be paid on October 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of September 10, 2025. PPL Corporation, based in Allentown, Pennsylvania, is a renowned company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol PPL.
French Foreign Minister: Time is running out in the negotiations on the Iranian nuclear file
